description: Validated header navigation on mobile; found inconsistent and incorrect targets for 'videos' (Home/Blog pages point to /vidoes) and 'contact' (404 page points to /contcat).

issues.name: Incorrect navigation target for 'videos' link on Home/Blog pages
issues.description: Expected: The "videos" link in the header should point to "/videos". Actual: The "videos" link in the header points to "/vidoes", which results in a 404 error.
reproductionSteps: Hover over or click the 'videos' link in the header.
issues.expectedBehavior: The "videos" link in the header should point to "/videos".
issues.actualBehavior: The "videos" link in the header points to "/vidoes", which results in a 404 error.

issues.name: Incorrect navigation target for 'contact' link on 404 page
issues.description: Expected: The 'contact' link in the header should point to '/contact'. Actual: The 'contact' link in the header points to '/contcat' instead of '/contact'.
reproductionSteps: Navigate to a non-existent page like http://localhost:3002/vidoes (or any 404 page).
Observe the 'contact' link in the header.
issues.expectedBehavior: The 'contact' link in the header should point to '/contact'.
issues.actualBehavior: The 'contact' link in the header points to '/contcat' instead of '/contact'.
